name: fullstack-pilot
description: Codebase governance for full-stack Microsoft shops (Angular, .NET, SQL Server, Azure)

plugins.name: pilot-core
plugins.description: Shared governance: stack detection, audit/fix pipelines, MCP discovery, and commands used by every other pilot plugin

plugins.name: pilot-angular
plugins.description: Angular / TypeScript governance: signals, performance, accessibility, security (permissions-ONLY route guards/UI gating), HTTP resilience, the v15-to-v20 upgrade path, coding standards, multi-layout shells, theming, shared UI libraries, and JSON-schema-driven dynamic forms

plugins.name: pilot-dotnet
plugins.description: C# / ASP.NET Core governance: Clean Architecture, SOLID/DRY, performance, caching, permissions-ONLY auth (no role checks), multitenancy, soft delete, audit fields, CORS, repository pattern, shared libraries, Excel/PDF document I/O, email templating, Guid entity keys, API versioning, modular DI, Hangfire background jobs, DB-backed configuration, and localization

plugins.name: pilot-sql
plugins.description: SQL Server / EF Core governance: injection defense, migration safety, multitenancy isolation, and performance review

plugins.name: pilot-azure
plugins.description: Azure / Bicep governance: CAF naming, security baseline, Well-Architected Framework review, and Bicep patterns
